markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing collaboration between fwd.digital and Chargeflow](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation services, combining technology with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Chargeflow could benefit from content refresh strategy, given their existing 346 blog posts with untapped potential](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Proposed workflow: 50,000 words/month at $0.10/word, including strategy, editing, and technology](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Next steps involve sharing proposal details and potentially starting collaboration in February](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

## Topics

### Chargeflow Overview

  - [Based in Israel (Tel Aviv/Modi'in)](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Automates chargeback fighting process for online merchants](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Serves B2B and e-commerce clients](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Experiencing rapid growth in \~3 years of operation](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Combines AI-powered content creation with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Uses custom-built workflows and research agents](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Focuses on creating high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Offers content strategy, creation, and optimization services](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Demonstrated success with clients like Deep (24x traffic increase, 300k newsletter subscribers)](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Proposed Collaboration

  - [Initial focus on refreshing existing Chargeflow content (346 blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - Aim to improve underperforming content (50%+ getting \<10 clicks)
  - [Content production at \~50,000 words/month](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Pricing model: $0.10/word, inclusive of strategy, editing, and technology](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Extensive research and context-building for client's industry](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [AI-powered outline generation and article writing](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Human editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Fact-checking and citation inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Optional image generation (stock or AI-generated)](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### Expectations and Limitations

  - [Focus on high-quality content production and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Does not include conversion rate optimization](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Relies on client for conversion tracking and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send sample SLW (Service Level Worksheet) and recording](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Add Chargeflow team to Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Potential project start date: February 10th (aligning with Chargeflow's new landing page launch on Jan 28th)](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide financial agreement details](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Chargeflow to review proposal and discuss internally with CMO/co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/WTj7vHstvHZq_PrF3jfMPFKED6ZyMyDk?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
